# copilot-instructions-template

> Lean/Kaizen GitHub Copilot template for VS Code projects. It ships a VS Code agent plugin, setup or update lifecycle docs, model-pinned agents, reusable skills, starter kits, hooks, MCP config, and workspace identity scaffolding.

## Install and lifecycle

- [SETUP.md](SETUP.md): Plugin marketplace install, source bootstrap, local `chat.pluginLocations`, ownership modes, verification, and update or restore phrases.
- [README.md](README.md): Human quick start, install routes, and contributor overview.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Machine entry point and canonical trigger phrases.
- [plugin.json](plugin.json): Root Copilot-format plugin manifest.
- [.plugin/plugin.json](.plugin/plugin.json): OpenPlugin manifest.
- [.claude-plugin/plugin.json](.claude-plugin/plugin.json): Claude-format plugin manifest.
- [starter-kits/REGISTRY.json](starter-kits/REGISTRY.json): Starter-kit registry and detection metadata.
- [.copilot/workspace/operations/workspace-index.json](.copilot/workspace/operations/workspace-index.json): Canonical machine-readable repo inventory.

## Canonical instructions and templates

- [.github/copilot-instructions.md](.github/copilot-instructions.md): Always-loaded developer instructions.
- [template/copilot-instructions.md](template/copilot-instructions.md): Consumer instruction template with placeholders.
- [MODELS.md](MODELS.md): Single source of truth for model assignments and thinking effort.
- [template/setup/interview.md](template/setup/interview.md): Setup interview question bank.
- [template/setup/manifests.md](template/setup/manifests.md): Setup companion-file manifests and ownership rules.
- [template/copilot-setup-steps.yml](template/copilot-setup-steps.yml): GitHub Actions setup-steps scaffold.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Version history and migrations.

## Agents

- [agents/setup.agent.md](agents/setup.agent.md): Template lifecycle, setup, update, backup restore, and factory restore.
- [agents/coding.agent.md](agents/coding.agent.md): Multi-step implementation and refactoring.
- [agents/review.agent.md](agents/review.agent.md): Deep code review and architecture critique.
- [agents/audit.agent.md](agents/audit.agent.md): Health and security audit.
- [agents/commit.agent.md](agents/commit.agent.md): Git lifecycle and release operations.
- [agents/debugger.agent.md](agents/debugger.agent.md): Root-cause analysis and regression triage.
- [agents/docs.agent.md](agents/docs.agent.md): Documentation and migration notes.
- [agents/planner.agent.md](agents/planner.agent.md): Read-only planning and task decomposition.
- [agents/explore.agent.md](agents/explore.agent.md): Fast read-only codebase exploration.
- [agents/researcher.agent.md](agents/researcher.agent.md): Online and offline research.
- [agents/cleaner.agent.md](agents/cleaner.agent.md): Repository hygiene and stale-artifact cleanup.
- [agents/organise.agent.md](agents/organise.agent.md): Structural cleanup, moves, and path repair.
- [agents/extensions.agent.md](agents/extensions.agent.md): VS Code extensions, profiles, and workspace config.
- [agents/fast.agent.md](agents/fast.agent.md): Quick questions and lightweight edits.

## Skills

- [skills/accessibility-review/SKILL.md](skills/accessibility-review/SKILL.md): WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit and fixes.
- [skills/agentic-workflows/SKILL.md](skills/agentic-workflows/SKILL.md): GitHub Actions workflows with Copilot coding agents.
- [skills/api-design/SKILL.md](skills/api-design/SKILL.md): REST/GraphQL API design and OpenAPI review.
- [skills/changelog-entry/SKILL.md](skills/changelog-entry/SKILL.md): Generate CHANGELOG entries from commits or diffs.
- [skills/commit-preflight/SKILL.md](skills/commit-preflight/SKILL.md): CI-aware preflight checks before commit or push.
- [skills/compress-prose/SKILL.md](skills/compress-prose/SKILL.md): Shorten prose without losing required meaning.
- [skills/conventional-commit/SKILL.md](skills/conventional-commit/SKILL.md): Conventional Commit message composition.
- [skills/create-adr/SKILL.md](skills/create-adr/SKILL.md): Architectural Decision Records.
- [skills/dependency-update/SKILL.md](skills/dependency-update/SKILL.md): Update dependencies and run vulnerability scan.
- [skills/docker-scaffold/SKILL.md](skills/docker-scaffold/SKILL.md): Scaffold production-ready Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml.
- [skills/env-config/SKILL.md](skills/env-config/SKILL.md): .env management, startup validation, and secrets separation.
- [skills/extension-review/SKILL.md](skills/extension-review/SKILL.md): VS Code extension auditing.
- [skills/fix-ci-failure/SKILL.md](skills/fix-ci-failure/SKILL.md): CI failure diagnosis and repair.
- [skills/issue-triage/SKILL.md](skills/issue-triage/SKILL.md): Issue severity, waste labels, and response drafting.
- [skills/lean-pr-review/SKILL.md](skills/lean-pr-review/SKILL.md): Lean PR review workflow.
- [skills/mcp-builder/SKILL.md](skills/mcp-builder/SKILL.md): Scaffold and register MCP servers.
- [skills/mcp-management/SKILL.md](skills/mcp-management/SKILL.md): Configure and manage MCP servers.
- [skills/onboarding-docs/SKILL.md](skills/onboarding-docs/SKILL.md): Generate README, CONTRIBUTING, and dev setup validation.
- [skills/performance-profiling/SKILL.md](skills/performance-profiling/SKILL.md): Profile hot paths and apply targeted optimizations.
- [skills/plugin-management/SKILL.md](skills/plugin-management/SKILL.md): Discover, install, and manage agent plugins.
- [skills/refactor-extract/SKILL.md](skills/refactor-extract/SKILL.md): Systematically extract functions, classes, or modules safely.
- [skills/security-audit/SKILL.md](skills/security-audit/SKILL.md): Security review workflow.
- [skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md](skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md): Create a new agent skill.
- [skills/skill-management/SKILL.md](skills/skill-management/SKILL.md): Discover and manage skills.
- [skills/tech-debt-audit/SKILL.md](skills/tech-debt-audit/SKILL.md): Catalog TODOs, dead code, complexity hotspots, and deprecated APIs.
- [skills/test-coverage-review/SKILL.md](skills/test-coverage-review/SKILL.md): Coverage review and test-gap analysis.
- [skills/tool-protocol/SKILL.md](skills/tool-protocol/SKILL.md): Search before building automation.
- [skills/webapp-testing/SKILL.md](skills/webapp-testing/SKILL.md): Browser testing with VS Code tools or Playwright.

## Consumer instruction stubs and prompts

- [template/instructions/api-routes.instructions.md](template/instructions/api-routes.instructions.md): API route conventions.
- [template/instructions/config.instructions.md](template/instructions/config.instructions.md): Config and RC-file conventions.
- [template/instructions/docs.instructions.md](template/instructions/docs.instructions.md): Documentation conventions.
- [template/instructions/terminal.instructions.md](template/instructions/terminal.instructions.md): Terminal session safety.
- [template/instructions/tests.instructions.md](template/instructions/tests.instructions.md): Test and spec conventions.
- [template/prompts/commit-msg.prompt.md](template/prompts/commit-msg.prompt.md): Commit-message prompt.
- [template/prompts/context-map.prompt.md](template/prompts/context-map.prompt.md): Codebase context-map prompt.
- [template/prompts/explain.prompt.md](template/prompts/explain.prompt.md): Explanation prompt.
- [template/prompts/onboard-commit-style.prompt.md](template/prompts/onboard-commit-style.prompt.md): Commit-style onboarding prompt.
- [template/prompts/refactor.prompt.md](template/prompts/refactor.prompt.md): Refactor prompt.
- [template/prompts/review-file.prompt.md](template/prompts/review-file.prompt.md): Single-file review prompt.
- [template/prompts/test-gen.prompt.md](template/prompts/test-gen.prompt.md): Test-generation prompt.

## Starter kits

- [starter-kits/cpp/.claude-plugin/plugin.json](starter-kits/cpp/.claude-plugin/plugin.json): C++ starter kit plugin manifest.
- [starter-kits/docker/.claude-plugin/plugin.json](starter-kits/docker/.claude-plugin/plugin.json): Docker starter kit plugin manifest.
- [starter-kits/go/.claude-plugin/plugin.json](starter-kits/go/.claude-plugin/plugin.json): Go starter kit plugin manifest.
- [starter-kits/java/.claude-plugin/plugin.json](starter-kits/java/.claude-plugin/plugin.json): Java starter kit plugin manifest.
- [starter-kits/python/.claude-plugin/plugin.json](starter-kits/python/.claude-plugin/plugin.json): Python starter kit plugin manifest.
- [starter-kits/react/.claude-plugin/plugin.json](starter-kits/react/.claude-plugin/plugin.json): React starter kit plugin manifest.
- [starter-kits/rust/.claude-plugin/plugin.json](starter-kits/rust/.claude-plugin/plugin.json): Rust starter kit plugin manifest.
- [starter-kits/typescript/.claude-plugin/plugin.json](starter-kits/typescript/.claude-plugin/plugin.json): TypeScript starter kit plugin manifest.

## Hook and runtime surfaces

- [hooks/hooks.json](hooks/hooks.json): Plugin hook registration.
- [template/hooks/copilot-hooks.json](template/hooks/copilot-hooks.json): All-local hook-config template.
- [template/vscode/settings.json](template/vscode/settings.json): VS Code settings template.
- [template/vscode/mcp.json](template/vscode/mcp.json): MCP server template.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Claude Code compatibility surface.

## Model strategy

Single source of truth: [MODELS.md](MODELS.md).
Sync command: `bash scripts/sync/sync-models.sh --write`.

| Surface | Recommended model | Thinking Effort | Role |
|---------|-------------------|-----------------|------|
| `setup.agent.md` | Claude Sonnet 4.6 | Medium | Template lifecycle |
| `coding.agent.md` | GPT-5.3-Codex | High | Implementation |
| `organise.agent.md` | GPT-5.3-Codex | Medium | Structural cleanup |
| `cleaner.agent.md` | GPT-5.3-Codex | Medium | Repository hygiene |
| `review.agent.md` | GPT-5.4 | High | Deep review |
| `fast.agent.md` | Claude Haiku 4.5 | Low | Quick lookups |
| `audit.agent.md` | GPT-5.4 | High | Health and security audit |
| `explore.agent.md` | Claude Haiku 4.5 | Low | Codebase exploration |
| `extensions.agent.md` | Claude Sonnet 4.6 | Medium | Extension management |
| `researcher.agent.md` | Claude Sonnet 4.6 | High | Research |
| `commit.agent.md` | GPT-5.2 | Low | Git lifecycle |
| `planner.agent.md` | GPT-5.4 | High | Planning |
| `docs.agent.md` | Claude Sonnet 4.6 | Medium | Documentation |
| `debugger.agent.md` | GPT-5.4 | High | Failure diagnosis |

## Validation

- Main suite: `bash tests/run-all.sh`
- Captured full suite: `bash scripts/harness/run-all-captured.sh`
- Metadata sync: `bash scripts/workspace/sync-workspace-index.sh --check`
- Model registry sync: `bash scripts/sync/sync-models.sh --check`

## Human documentation

See [README.md](README.md) for the human-readable overview and quick-start guidance.
